name: value-proposition-design-how-to-create-products-and-services-customers-want
description: Alexander Osterwalder's guide to the Value Proposition Canvas — map customers' jobs, pains, and gains, then design products that fit.
useCase: Design products and services customers actually want using the Value Proposition Canvas and fit methodology.
knownRisks: Simplifies complex product development into a two-sided canvas
Customer discovery requires real interviews, not just desk research
Fit is harder to achieve than the framework suggests
